metadata.description: Sabha — a marketplace of agentic generals. Ships the data-engineer (Argus) and messenger (Narada) generals plus the shared sabha-core runtime (telemetry, allowlist gate, auto-update). Install the `sabha` umbrella for everything at once, or a single general on its own.

plugins.name: sabha
plugins.description: Umbrella: installs the shared sabha-core runtime plus every general (Argus, Narada) in one step. Each general contributes its own MCP server. Install a single general directly if you only want one.

plugins.name: sabha-core
plugins.description: Shared Sabha runtime: consolidated telemetry, one-time `sabha auth <email>`, the email-allowlist gate, and the auto-update hint. Installed automatically as a dependency of every Sabha agent.

plugins.name: argus
plugins.description: Data-engineer general: connector-agnostic data verbs (New Relic, Redash) + telemetry baselining + KPI health + instrumentation audits. Review-gated apply.

plugins.name: narada
plugins.description: Messenger general: connector-agnostic messaging signal triage and reply drafting on top of a watchlist + voice profile (Slack today).
